active_goal: Improve MemoryOS Lite v3 into a benchmark-usable Letta-style agent memory system for LongMemEval and LoCoMo, without demo-only phase completion, without hiding case-level regressions, and without enabling the v3 kernel by default.
required_ack_notes: ACK must cite that selected_passage_ids, selected_source_refs, selected_passage_count, and archival_selected diagnostics are post-budget and exclude budget-dropped archival passages.
ACK must cite separated LongMemEval and LoCoMo reports, including LoCoMo 0/30.

ACK must state archival totals are zero in the 30-case public reports because those benchmark cases did not seed attached archives, so this is diagnostic plumbing evidence rather than an archive-quality improvement claim.
ACK must replace the stale .hermes-loop/work/phase-4/ack.json Archival Memory Store artifact and must not reuse its 343-test/no-benchmark evidence.
ACK must preserve that MEMORYOS_AGENT_KERNEL=v1 remains opt-in/default-off and v1 fallback remains explicit.
